title: Hollyone 6.3'' Fushia Peony Artificial Flowers with 29.1'' Long Stem, 3PCS Large Fake Peonies Decorative Faux Flowers for Autumn Decorations, Home, Wedding, Party, Floral Arrangements
features: 3 long-stem fake peony flowers are included in this set. Each bendable stem boasts a length of approximately 29.1''/74cm, with large peony flower heads measuring about 6.3 inches (16 cm) in diameter. Additionally, these decorative artificial flowers are adorned with vivid leaves that enhance their natural appearance.

Crafted from soft silk cloth, these fushia artificial flowers offer a touch of realism with gradient colours, delicate layers of petals, and distinct veins on both the flower heads and green leaves. Their stems are flexible, constructed from iron wire encased in green durable material, making them not only easy to arrange but also simple to trim as desired.

These versatile long stem peony flowers are perfect for various occasions and decor themes. Whether used to create stunning bouquets, floral arrangements, or as accents in vases, they bring a touch of sophistication to weddings, baby showers, or even as centrepieces for dining tables, complementing both shabby chic and vintage-inspired decor of your kitchen, living room, bathroom, garden, or balcony.

Designed for durability, these large fake flowers require minimal maintenance, promising to maintain their beauty throughout the year. With their timeless charm, these artificial flowers for decorations are sure to remain a classic choice for enhancing any space. Their colour variations add to their elegance, ensuring they blend seamlessly into any decor style.

Hollyone offers only premium quality artificial flower stems, fake plant branches, picks, wreaths and garlands. We’ve carefully curated our collection of hyper-realistic, stunning botanicals to compliment your interior design. Find more inspirations for decorating home, office, party, or events for all seasons in our shop.
